scope_note: QA WGS84 Ellipse Cert family [156]: certifies that the WGS84 reference ellipsoid (Earth's oblate spheroid) IS a QA quantum ellipse with QN (101,9,110,119). Eccentricity e/d=9/110=0.081818... matches WGS84 first eccentricity 0.081819... to 0.001%. Axis ratio sqrt(ab)/d=sqrt(12019)/110=0.996647... matches WGS84 b/a=0.996647... to 7 significant figures. Triple (C,F,G)=(1980,12019,12181). Earth orbit QN (59,1,60,61) separately matches orbital eccentricity 1/60=0.01667 (actual 0.01671, 0.25% error). Tier 1: exact reformulation — no empirical claim, pure algebraic identity between WGS84 parameters and QA quantum ellipse.
